document_meta.file_name: DATA PROCESSING AGREEMENT AND TECHNOLOGY SERVICES TERMS.pdf

controls.title: Strict Purpose Limitation
found_elements: processing only on documented or written instructions of the bank
processing only for agreed services or on behalf of the bank
missing_elements: no vendor secondary use of personal data
no internal use for analytics, improvement, or model training without approval
matched_clauses:
2. Definitions
For the purposes of this Agreement:
“Bank Data” means all records, files, reports, account-level information, transaction metadata, logs, customer
information, employee information, operational data, and any Personal Data or confidential information
processed by Nimbus Ledger Technologies Private Limited on behalf of Konkan Urban Bank Limited.
“Personal Data” means any data about an identified or identifiable natural person processed under this
Agreement.
“Services” means the hosted software platform, implementation support, reconciliation workflows, case
management tools, support desk functions, managed file exchange capability, reporting services, and related
technical support provided under this Agreement.
4.1 Nimbus Ledger Technologies Private Limited shall process Personal Data and Bank Data solely on behalf of

documented instructions communicated in writing, including instructions issued through signed statements of
work, support tickets, implementation records, or authorized email communications.
evidence_snippets: "documented instructions communicated in writing, including instructions issued through signed statements of work, support tickets, implementation records, or authorized email communications." (seg_012)
"process Personal Data and Bank Data solely on behalf of" (seg_011)
"processed by Nimbus Ledger Technologies Private Limited on behalf of Konkan Urban Bank Limited" (seg_006)
controls.reason: The clauses explicitly tie processing to written bank instructions and to acting on behalf of the bank, satisfying two mandatory requirements. No language limits secondary or internal uses, so those mandatory elements are missing. No optional prohibitions or red‑flag/contradictory language are present.
controls.recommended_fix_summary: Add or strengthen language covering: no vendor secondary use of personal data.
controls.banking_regulatory_relevance: Relevant for bank oversight, vendor risk, and regulatory defensibility.

controls.title: Adequate Security Safeguards
found_elements: protection against unauthorized access, loss, misuse, or breach
matched_clauses:
5.3 Nimbus Ledger Technologies Private Limited shall use appropriate access controls and internal procedures
to prevent unauthorized use or disclosure of Bank Data.

6.3 Nimbus Ledger Technologies Private Limited shall encrypt Bank Data in transit over public or shared
networks using current industry-standard cryptographic protocols and shall encrypt Bank Data at rest within
production databases, object storage, and backup repositories using strong encryption mechanisms managed
under documented key-management procedures.

6.4 Nimbus Ledger Technologies Private Limited shall maintain role-based access controls, least-privilege
access assignments, multi-factor authentication for privileged access, centralized logging of administrative
evidence_snippets: use appropriate access controls ... to prevent unauthorized use or disclosure of Bank Data.
encrypt Bank Data in transit ... and encrypt Bank Data at rest ... using strong encryption mechanisms
maintain role-based access controls, least-privilege access assignments, multi-factor authentication for privileged access, centralized logging
maintains an information security management system aligned to ISO 27001 principles
controls.reason: The clauses provide specific technical and organizational safeguards and address unauthorized access, but lack an overarching general security commitment.
controls.recommended_fix_summary: Add or strengthen language covering: general security commitment.
controls.banking_regulatory_relevance: Relevant for bank oversight, vendor risk, and regulatory defensibility.

controls.title: Breach Notification SLAs
found_elements: explicit notification obligation for incidents or breaches
trigger based on discovery or awareness of the incident
defined timeline or very tight timing language
missing_elements: vendor cooperation or support after notice
matched_clauses:
7.1 Nimbus Ledger Technologies Private Limited shall notify Konkan Urban Bank Limited immediately, and in
any event no later than six hours after becoming aware of any Security Incident affecting Bank Data.
evidence_snippets: shall notify Konkan Urban Bank Limited immediately, and in any event no later than six hours after becoming aware of any Security Incident affecting Bank Data
controls.reason: The clause in seg_032 satisfies notification, discovery trigger, and a six‑hour deadline, meeting three mandatory requirements and includes the word 'immediately' as an optional strengthener. No provision addresses post‑notice cooperation, so that mandatory element is missing. No downgrade language or contradictory terms are present.
controls.recommended_fix_summary: Add or strengthen language covering: vendor cooperation or support after notice.
controls.banking_regulatory_relevance: Relevant for bank oversight, vendor risk, and regulatory defensibility.

controls.title: Assistance with Data Principal Rights (DSRs)
found_elements: applies within vendor systems or hosted environments
matched_clauses:
8.1 Nimbus Ledger Technologies Private Limited shall, taking into account the nature of the processing and the
information available to it, provide reasonable assistance to Konkan Urban Bank Limited in responding to
customer and data principal requests relating to access, correction, rectification, update, or deletion of
Personal Data processed in connection with the Services.

12.5 Nimbus Ledger Technologies Private Limited shall, upon written request of Konkan Urban Bank Limited,
provide a written confirmation signed by an authorized officer stating that deletion from active systems has
been completed.

8.3 Nimbus Ledger Technologies Private Limited shall make reasonable efforts to search for, retrieve, correct,
and delete relevant Personal Data within the hosted environment to the extent necessary for the Bank to
comply with applicable law.
evidence_snippets: provide reasonable assistance ... in responding to ... requests relating to access, correction, rectification, ... or deletion of Personal Data
make reasonable efforts to search for, retrieve, correct, and delete relevant Personal Data within the hosted environment
provide a written confirmation ... that deletion from active systems has been completed
controls.reason: The clauses contain explicit assistance for access, correction, and deletion (seg_040) and specify actions within the hosted environment (seg_042), satisfying all mandatory elements. Seg_042 also mentions searching for data, matching the optional export/search support strengthener. However, the language is qualified by "reasonable" assistance/efforts, which are downgrade triggers and flagged as red flags.
controls.recommended_fix_summary: Add or strengthen language covering: remove weakening language: reasonable assistance.
controls.banking_regulatory_relevance: Relevant for bank oversight, vendor risk, and regulatory defensibility.

controls.title: Sub-processing Restrictions
missing_elements: prior written authorization or approval of the bank
equivalent obligations imposed on the sub-processor
controls.reason: No relevant clauses were retrieved for this control.
controls.recommended_fix_summary: Add or strengthen language covering: prior written authorization or approval of the bank.
controls.banking_regulatory_relevance: Relevant for bank oversight, vendor risk, and regulatory defensibility.

controls.title: Data Deletion / Return upon Termination
missing_elements: applies on termination, expiry, or bank instruction
covers personal data held by the vendor
matched_clauses:
12.4 Bank Data contained in backups or disaster recovery media that cannot be immediately deleted in the
ordinary course may be retained until such media is recycled, overwritten, or naturally expires under the
vendor’s standard backup retention schedule, provided that such retained data remains subject to
confidentiality and security protections no less protective than those set out in this Agreement.
evidence_snippets: "Bank Data contained in backups or disaster recovery media that cannot be immediately deleted ... may be retained until such media is recycled, overwritten, or naturally expires under the vendor’s standard backup retention schedule"
red_flags: retention tied to vendor's backup schedule rather than a termination deletion deadline
no explicit timeline for deletion or return
allows data to remain until media is naturally expires, which may be indefinite
controls.reason: The clause discusses backup retention but does not impose a return or deletion obligation upon contract termination, lacks timing, and relies on vendor policy, leaving gaps in mandatory requirements.
controls.recommended_fix_summary: Add or strengthen language covering: return or delete obligation exists.
controls.banking_regulatory_relevance: Relevant for bank oversight, vendor risk, and regulatory defensibility.

controls.title: Audit Rights and Regulatory Access
found_elements: access to relevant records, systems, controls, or evidence
audit right is meaningful and not illusory
bank may use external auditors or appointed assessors
matched_clauses:
review, or inquiry by a banking regulator, supervisory authority, or other competent authority having
jurisdiction over Konkan Urban Bank Limited to the extent relevant to the Services or the processing of Bank
Data.
10.1 Konkan Urban Bank Limited, its internal auditors, statutory auditors, external professional advisers, and
availability, provide production support, and enable export of reports and case records on request.
evidence_snippets: "Konkan Urban Bank Limited, its internal auditors, statutory auditors, external professional advisers" (seg_049)
"shall cooperate with any lawful request, inspection, audit, ... by a banking regulator, supervisory authority" (seg_054)
"enable export of reports and case records on request" (seg_010)
controls.reason: The clauses grant the bank and its internal/external auditors explicit audit rights, obligate the vendor to cooperate with lawful audit requests, provide rights to obtain relevant records and system evidence, and contain no limiting language that would render the audit right illusory. Optional strengtheners are present for internal/external auditors and regulator support.

key_gaps: Strict Purpose Limitation: no vendor secondary use of personal data
Adequate Security Safeguards: general security commitment
Breach Notification SLAs: vendor cooperation or support after notice
Assistance with Data Principal Rights (DSRs): remove weakening language: reasonable assistance
Sub-processing Restrictions: prior written authorization or approval of the bank
recommended_next_actions: Add or strengthen language covering: no vendor secondary use of personal data.
Add or strengthen language covering: general security commitment.
Add or strengthen language covering: vendor cooperation or support after notice.
Add or strengthen language covering: remove weakening language: reasonable assistance.
Add or strengthen language covering: prior written authorization or approval of the bank.
